reviews.comment:
Los Baños Muy Sucios y poca variedad de comidas rápidas, precios caros. Y la parrilla con carne muy quemada y dura y también los baños cerca de la parrilla sin agua y espantosamente sucios.👎🏼👎🏼👎🏼

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms were filthy, there was little variety in the fast food, and the prices were high. The grill had very burnt and tough meat, and the bathrooms near the grill were also filthy and had no water. 👎🏼👎🏼👎🏼
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNVNS1teVZREAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente parada. Muy buena la comida rápida en el Full. Mejor calidad que un McD o BK. Espacios para comer. Juegos para niños (laberinto). Muy limpio todo. Afuera, excelente espacio para descansar.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent stop. The fast food at Full is very good. Better quality than McDonald's or Burger King. Plenty of seating. Children's play area (maze). Very clean. Outside, a great space to relax.
